sections.paragraph:
- Original: Μαΐνάν

- Transliteration: Mainan

- Phonetic: mahee-nan'

- Definition: Menan = "soothsayer: enchanted"

1. one of the ancestors of Joseph in the genealogy of Jesus Christ

- Origin: probably of hebrew origin

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Probably of hebrew origin; Mainan an Israelite: - Mainan.
